# Security Policy

## Reporting a vulnerability

Please do not report security vulnerabilities in public issues.

Instead, contact the maintainer privately through the repository owner profile:

- <https://github.com/hellosamblack>

When reporting a vulnerability, include:

- a description of the issue
- affected versions and configuration
- steps to reproduce the problem
- potential impact
- any suggested mitigation or fix

I will investigate reported issues as quickly as possible and coordinate a fix
before public disclosure when appropriate.
